info.description:
**Quick Face Engine API Server**

Provides face detection, recognition, and database management capabilities.

---

**Response Format**

All endpoints return JSON with the following structure:
```json
{
"success": true,
"error_code": 0,
"msg": "Operation completed",
"data": { ... }
}
```

- `success`: Operation result (true/false)
- `error_code`: 0 = success, negative = error (see QFE_RET_CODE)
- `msg`: Human-readable message
- `data`: Response payload

**Base path:** `/api/v3` (OpenAPI `basePath`). Monitoring aliases: `GET /health`, `GET /stats` also at server root.
info.title: QFE API Server

get.description:
Returns the current auto template update setting.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `mode` (int): `0` = disabled · `1` = enabled

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-4` SDK not initialized · `-32` parameter not supported

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, path parameters, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

put.description:
Enables or disables automatic template update during identification. When enabled, the SDK updates a user's stored template with the newly extracted template upon successful identification — this improves recognition accuracy over time. The setting is persisted to `system_parameter.cfg`.

**Request body:**
- `mode` *(required)*: `0` = disabled · `1` = enabled

**Response `data` fields:**
- `mode` (int): The newly applied mode value

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-33` invalid mode value · `-32` parameter not supported · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

get.description:
Returns the maximum number of SDK instances allowed by the current license and how many are currently active.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `max_instance` (int): Maximum instances allowed by license
- `number_of_instance` (int): Currently active instances

**Error codes:** `0` always succeeds (does not require SDK initialization)

post.description:
Reloads system parameters (matching threshold, max face, auto-update mode) from `system_parameter.cfg` on disk.
Use this to revert in-memory settings to the last saved state without restarting the server.

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-91` config file not found · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, path parameters, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

get.description:
Returns the current limit on the number of faces detected per image in face detection operations.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `max_face` (int): Maximum faces detected per image (default: `10`)

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-4` SDK not initialized · `-32` parameter not supported

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, path parameters, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

put.description:
Sets the maximum number of faces detected per image. The value is persisted to `system_parameter.cfg` automatically.

**Request body:**
- `max_face` *(required)*: Integer `1–10`. Setting this lower improves speed; higher allows more faces per frame.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `max_face` (int): The newly applied limit

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-33` value out of range · `-32` parameter not supported · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Resets all system parameters (matching threshold, max face, auto-update mode) to their factory default values in memory.
Does **not** overwrite `system_parameter.cfg` automatically — call `/save-config` afterwards to persist.

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, path parameters, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

post.description:
Persists the current in-memory system parameters (matching threshold, max face, auto-update mode) to `system_parameter.cfg`.
Note: parameter-setting endpoints (`/matching-threshold`, `/max-face`, `/auto-template-update`) call this automatically.

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, path parameters, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

get.description:
Returns the current face similarity threshold used by `/identify`, `/verify`, and `/match-images`.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `threshold` (int): Current threshold value — range `0–100000`
- Higher value = stricter match requirement (fewer false positives, more false negatives)
- Lower value = more lenient (fewer false negatives, more false positives)
- Default is approximately `75204` (≈ 75.2% similarity)

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-4` SDK not initialized · `-32` parameter not supported

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, path parameters, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

put.description:
Updates the face similarity threshold used by `/identify`, `/verify`, and `/match-images`. The new value is persisted to `system_parameter.cfg` automatically.

**Request body:**
- `threshold` *(required)*: Integer in range `0–100000`
- Higher = stricter (fewer false accepts, more false rejects)
- Lower = more lenient (more false accepts, fewer false rejects)
- Recommended range: `70000–85000`

**Response `data` fields:**
- `threshold` (int): The newly applied threshold value

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-33` value out of range · `-801` failed to set · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Performs face detection and head pose estimation in a single call. Optimized for real-time video pipelines.

> ⚠️ **This endpoint accepts raw pixel data, NOT JPEG/PNG.**
> Decode your image to raw RGB/BGR bytes first, then Base64-encode those bytes.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded raw RGB or BGR pixel data (not JPEG/PNG)
- `width` *(required)*: Image width in pixels (1–4000)
- `height` *(required)*: Image height in pixels (1–4000)
- `channel` *(required)*: Color channels — use `3` for RGB or BGR

**Response `data` fields:**
- `face_count` (int): Number of faces detected
- `faces[]`: Array of detected faces
- `face_rect`: Bounding box `{x, y, width, height}`
- `landmarks[]`: 5 facial landmark points `[{x, y}, ...]`
- `head_pose`: `{yaw, pitch, roll}` in degrees (range ≈ ±90°)

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face · `-400` head pose failed · `-401` pose out of range · `80`/`81` session busy · `-90` invalid dimensions

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, payload size, or dimensions

422.description: Unprocessable: pipeline failed (SDK error)

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or too many concurrent requests

post.description:
Estimates demographic and physical attributes of the face detected in the image.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG or PNG image. Must contain a clearly visible face.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `face_rect`: Bounding box of the detected face `{x, y, width, height}`
- `attribute.age` (int): Estimated age in years
- `attribute.gender` (string): `"male"` or `"female"`

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face detected · `-600` attribute estimation failed · `80` FD busy · `82` FAM busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Detects all faces in a JPEG/PNG image and returns bounding boxes with 5-point landmarks.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG or PNG image. Max 50 MB.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `face_count` (int): Number of faces detected (0 if none)
- `faces[]`: Array of detected face objects
- `face_rect`: Bounding box — `{x, y, width, height}` in pixels
- `landmarks[]`: 5 facial landmark points — `[{x, y}, ...]` (left eye, right eye, nose, left mouth, right mouth)

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face detected · `80` FD session busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, image size, or parameters

422.description: Unprocessable: face detection failed (SDK error)

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

post.description:
Detects multiple faces from a raw pixel image. Returns bounding boxes, landmarks, image quality score, and cropped (warped) face images per face.

> ⚠️ **This endpoint accepts raw pixel data, NOT JPEG/PNG.**
> Decode your image to raw RGB/BGR bytes first, then Base64-encode those bytes.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded raw RGB or BGR pixel data (not JPEG/PNG)
- `width` *(required)*: Image width in pixels (1–4000)
- `height` *(required)*: Image height in pixels (1–4000)
- `channel` *(required)*: Color channels — use `3` for RGB or BGR

**Response `data` fields:**
- `face_count` (int): Number of faces detected
- `detections[]`: Array per face
- `face_rect`: Bounding box `{x, y, width, height}`
- `landmarks[]`: 5 landmark points `[{x, y}, ...]`
- `image_quality` (float): Quality score (higher is better)
- `warped_image` (string): Base64-encoded cropped & aligned face image

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face · `80` FD session busy · `-90` invalid dimensions · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, dimensions, or payload size

422.description: Unprocessable: multi detection failed (SDK error)

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

post.description:
Searches all enrolled users and returns the best-matching user if the similarity exceeds the current threshold.
This is a 1:N operation — performance depends on the number of enrolled users.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG or PNG image. Must contain exactly one face. Max 50 MB.

**Response `data` fields (on match):**
- `user_id` (int): ID of the matched user
- `sub_id` (int): Template sub-index of the best-matching template
- `match_score` (int): Similarity score `0–100000`
- `threshold` (int): Threshold used for this decision

> If no match is found, `success` will be `false` and `error_code` will be `-43`.

**Error codes:** `0` match found · `-43` no match (below threshold) · `-200` no face detected · `-400` head pose failed · `-700` template extraction failed · `80`/`81`/`83` session busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Detects whether the person in the image is wearing a face mask.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG or PNG image. Must contain a clearly visible face.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `face_rect`: Bounding box of the detected face `{x, y, width, height}`
- `has_mask` (bool): `true` if a mask is detected on the face

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face detected · `-500` mask segmentation failed · `80` FD busy · `84` MS busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Estimates head pose angles from a JPEG/PNG face image. Useful for liveness checks and quality filtering.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG or PNG image. Must contain a clearly visible face.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `face_rect`: Bounding box of the detected face `{x, y, width, height}`
- `head_pose.yaw` (float): Left/right rotation in degrees (range ≈ –90° to +90°; negative = left)
- `head_pose.pitch` (float): Up/down tilt in degrees (range ≈ –90° to +90°; negative = down)
- `head_pose.roll` (float): Head tilt/rotation in degrees (range ≈ –90° to +90°)

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face detected · `-400` HPE failed · `-401` pose out of detectable range · `80` FD busy · `81` HPE busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

get.description:
Returns the health status of the API server and QFE SDK. Suitable for load balancer health probes.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `status` (string): `"ok"` when SDK is initialized and ready
- `timestamp` (string): Current server time (RFC3339)
- `sdk_status.initialized` (bool): SDK fully initialized
- `sdk_status.license_activated` (bool): License active
- `sdk_status.model_loaded` (bool): AI models loaded
- `sdk_status.instance_created` (bool): Processing instance ready
- `sdk_status.last_health_check` (string): Timestamp of this check

**Error codes:** `0` healthy · `-1` server running but SDK not yet initialized

503.description: Degraded: API up but QFE SDK not initialized (success=false in body)

post.description:
Extracts templates from both images internally and compares them in a single call.
Use this for quick one-off comparisons. For batch workflows, extract templates separately with `/extract` then call `/match`.

**Request body:**
- `image1_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG/PNG image (first face)
- `image2_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG/PNG image (second face)

**Response `data` fields:**
- `similarity` (float): Raw match score (same scale as `/match` — range `0–100000`)
- `threshold` (float): Current decision threshold
- `is_same_person` (bool): `true` if `similarity >= threshold`

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face in image1 or image2 · `-700` template extraction failed · `80` FD busy · `83` FR busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Checks whether an image meets quality requirements for reliable face enrollment. Runs face detection and head pose estimation internally.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG/PNG image. Max 50 MB.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `is_valid` (bool): `true` if the image passes all quality checks
- `blur_score` (float): Blur level (lower = blurrier; recommended threshold varies by model)
- `luminance` (float): Average image brightness (0–255; extremes indicate under/over-exposure)
- `face_position`: Face bounding box `{x, y, width, height}`
- `head_pose`: `{yaw, pitch, roll}` — large values indicate non-frontal face
- `reject_reason` (string): Human-readable reason if `is_valid` is `false`

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face detected · `-400` head pose failed · `80` FD busy · `81` HPE busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

get.description:
Returns real-time statistics for request counts, memory usage, and concurrency.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `requests.total` (uint): Total requests received since startup
- `requests.completed` (uint): Successfully completed requests
- `requests.timed_out` (uint): Requests that exceeded the timeout
- `requests.rejected` (uint): Requests rejected due to overload (semaphore full)
- `memory.alloc_mb` (uint): Currently allocated heap memory (MB)
- `memory.heap_objects` (uint): Number of live heap objects
- `memory.gc_cycles` (uint): Number of completed GC cycles
- `memory.goroutines` (int): Active goroutine count
- `concurrency.max_concurrent_ops` (int): Max allowed simultaneous heavy operations
- `concurrency.semaphore_in_use` (int): Current heavy operations in flight

**Error codes:** `0` always succeeds

Returns version, initialization status, and license details of the QFE SDK.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `sdk_name` (string): Always `"QFE_SDK"`
- `version` (string): SDK version (e.g. `"1.1.6"`)
- `description` (string): Short description of the SDK
- `status` (string): `"ready"` when fully initialized, otherwise `"not_initialized"`
- `details.initialized` (bool): SDK fully initialized
- `details.license_activated` (bool): License successfully activated
- `details.model_loaded` (bool): AI models loaded into memory
- `details.instance_created` (bool): SDK processing instance created
- `details.last_health_check` (string): Timestamp of last health check (RFC3339)
- `details.max_instances` (int): Maximum SDK instances allowed by license (`QFE_GetMaxInstance`)

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-1` SDK not initialized

503.description: SDK not ready or has an initialization error (success=false in body)

get.description:
Returns the total number of face templates stored across all users in the database.
A single user can have multiple templates (one per enrollment call).

**Response `data` fields:**
- `count` (int): Total template count across all users

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, path parameters, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

post.description:
Extracts a compact face recognition feature vector (template) from a JPEG/PNG image.
The returned `template_data` can be used with `/match`, `/enroll-template`, `/identify-template`, and `/verify-template`.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG/PNG image. Max 50 MB. Must contain exactly one clearly visible face.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `template_data` (string): Base64-encoded feature vector — pass this to `/match` or `/enroll-template`
- `template_size` (int): Size of the template in bytes

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-200` no face detected · `-700` template extraction failed · `80` FD busy · `83` FR busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Searches all enrolled users using a pre-extracted template instead of re-processing an image.
Faster than `/identify` when the template was already extracted upstream (e.g. real-time video pipelines).

**Request body:**
- `template_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded face template from `/extract`

**Response `data` fields (on match):**
- `user_id` (int): ID of the matched user
- `sub_id` (int): Matched template sub-index
- `match_score` (int): Similarity score `0–100000`
- `threshold` (int): Threshold used for the decision

> If no match is found, `success` is `false` and `error_code` is `-43`.

**Error codes:** `0` match found · `-43` no match · `-90` invalid template · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized
post.summary: Identify a face — 1:N search (from pre-extracted template)

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Compares two pre-extracted face templates and returns a similarity score.
Use this when you already have templates from `/extract`. For direct image comparison use `/match-images`.

**Request body:**
- `template1` *(required)*: Base64-encoded template from `/extract`
- `template2` *(required)*: Base64-encoded template from `/extract`

**Response `data` fields:**
- `match_score` (int): Similarity score — range `0–100000` (higher = more similar)
- `threshold` (int): Current decision threshold (configurable via `/matching-threshold`)
- `is_same_person` (bool): `true` if `match_score >= threshold`

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-90` invalid template format · `-800` failed to get threshold · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

get.description:
Returns the complete list of user IDs currently enrolled in the face database, along with per-user template counts.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `user_count` (int): Total number of enrolled users
- `users[]`: Array of user objects
- `user_id` (int): User identifier
- `template_count` (int): Number of templates stored for this user

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

delete.description:
Permanently removes every enrolled user and all their templates from the face database.

> ⚠️ **This action is irreversible.** All enrollment data will be lost.

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

get.description:
Returns the total number of distinct users enrolled in the face database.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `count` (int): Number of enrolled users

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized

delete.description:
Permanently removes a user and all their enrolled face templates from the face database.

**Path parameter:**
- `user_id`: Integer `≥ 1`. The user ID to remove.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `user_id` (int): The deleted user ID
- `deleted` (bool): `true` if the deletion was successful

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-34` invalid user_id · `-28`/`-43` user not found · `-26` database delete failed · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid path parameter

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Registers a face from a JPEG/PNG image into the face database under the specified `user_id`.
After enrollment the user becomes searchable via `/faces/identify` and verifiable via `/users/{user_id}/verify`.
Multiple enrollments for the same `user_id` add additional templates (improves recognition accuracy).

**Path parameter:**
- `user_id`: Integer `≥ 1`. Choose a unique ID per person. Re-using an existing ID adds a new template to that user.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG or PNG image. Must contain exactly one clearly visible frontal face. Max 50 MB.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `user_id` (int): The enrolled user ID
- `sub_id` (int): Template sub-index assigned to this enrollment (starts at 0)
- `template_count` (int): Total number of templates now stored for this user

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-34` invalid user_id (must be ≥ 1) · `-40` max template limit reached · `-50` face differs from existing templates · `-200` no face detected · `-700` template extraction failed · `80` FD busy · `83` FR busy · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Registers a user using a feature vector previously extracted by `/templates/extract`, rather than re-processing the image.
Use this for batch enrollment pipelines where templates are extracted once and stored separately.

**Path parameter:**
- `user_id`: Integer `≥ 1`. Re-using an existing ID adds another template to that user.

**Request body:**
- `template_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded face template from `/templates/extract` or `/users/{user_id}/templates/{sub_id}`

**Response `data` fields:**
- `user_id` (int): The enrolled user ID
- `sub_id` (int): Template index assigned to this enrollment
- `template_count` (int): Total templates now stored for this user

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-34` invalid user_id · `-40` max template limit reached · `-50` face differs from existing templates · `-90` invalid template data · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

get.description:
Returns how many face templates are stored for the specified user.

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id`: Integer `≥ 1`

**Response `data` fields:**
- `user_id` (int): The queried user ID
- `count` (int): Number of templates stored for this user

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-34` invalid user_id · `-43` user not found · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized
get.summary: Get template count for a specific user

400.description: Bad request: invalid path parameter

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

get.description:
Retrieves a stored face template for a specific user and template index (`sub_id`). Useful for backup or cross-server migration.

**Path parameters:**
- `user_id`: Integer `≥ 1`
- `sub_id`: Template index (integer `≥ 0`). A user can have multiple templates (0, 1, 2, …). Check `/users/{user_id}/templates/count` for the available range.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `user_id` (int): The queried user ID
- `sub_id` (int): The template index returned
- `template_data` (string): Base64-encoded face feature vector — usable with `/users/{user_id}/templates`, `/templates/identify`, `/users/{user_id}/verify/template`
- `template_size` (int): Size in bytes

**Error codes:** `0` success · `-34` invalid user_id · `-35` invalid sub_id · `-43` template not found · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized

400.description: Bad request: invalid path parameters

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Checks whether the face in the image matches a specific enrolled user. Unlike `/faces/identify` (1:N), this only compares against the target `user_id`.

**Path parameter:**
- `user_id`: Integer `≥ 1`. The enrolled user to verify against.

**Request body:**
- `image_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded JPEG or PNG image. Max 50 MB.

**Response `data` fields:**
- `verified` (bool): `true` if the face matches the user above the threshold
- `user_id` (int): The queried user ID
- `sub_id` (int): Best-matching template sub-index
- `match_score` (int): Similarity score `0–100000`
- `threshold` (int): Threshold used for the decision

**Error codes:** `0` success (verified or not — check `verified` field) · `-34` invalid user_id · `-43` user not found in database · `-200` no face detected · `-700` template extraction failed · `-4` SDK not initialized
post.summary: Verify a face against a user — 1:1 (from image)

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload

post.description:
Checks whether a pre-extracted template matches a specific enrolled user. Skips the image decoding and feature extraction steps — use in latency-sensitive pipelines where the template is available upstream.

**Path parameter:**
- `user_id`: Integer `≥ 1`. The enrolled user to verify against.

**Request body:**
- `template_data` *(required)*: Base64-encoded face template from `/templates/extract`

**Response `data` fields:**
- `verified` (bool): `true` if the template matches the user above the threshold
- `user_id` (int): The queried user ID
- `sub_id` (int): Best-matching template sub-index
- `match_score` (int): Similarity score `0–100000`
- `threshold` (int): Threshold used for the decision

**Error codes:** `0` success (check `verified` field) · `-34` invalid user_id · `-43` user not found · `-90` invalid template data · `-29` database not loaded · `-4` SDK not initialized
post.summary: Verify a face against a user — 1:1 (from pre-extracted template)

400.description: Bad request: invalid JSON, body size, or client validation

422.description: Unprocessable: SDK or algorithm returned an error

503.description: Service unavailable: SDK not initialized or overload
